parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM event_logs WHERE tenant_id = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.tenantId + "'::uuid AND " + ($('02. Parser').first().json.typeEvenement ? "type_evenement = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.typeEvenement + "'" : "1=1") + " AND " + ($('02. Parser').first().json.statutExecution ? "statut_execution = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.statutExecution + "'" : "1=1") }}

={{ "SELECT id, tenant_id AS \"tenantId\", type_evenement AS \"typeEvenement\", entite_type AS \"entiteType\", entite_id AS \"entiteId\", payload, workflow_n8n_declenche AS \"workflowN8nDeclenche\", workflow_n8n_id AS \"workflowN8nId\", statut_execution AS \"statutExecution\", message_erreur AS \"messageErreur\", created_at AS \"createdAt\" FROM event_logs WHERE tenant_id = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.tenantId + "'::uuid AND " + ($('02. Parser').first().json.typeEvenement ? "type_evenement = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.typeEvenement + "'" : "1=1") + " AND " + ($('02. Parser').first().json.statutExecution ? "statut_execution = '" + $('02. Parser').first().json.statutExecution + "'" : "1=1") + " ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT " + $('02. Parser').first().json.limit + " OFFSET " + $('02. Parser').first().json.offset }}
